tile.title: National Growth & Prosperity
tile.desc: An in-depth analysis of the pillars of socio-economic development. Explore how industrial innovation and technological self-reliance propel a nation toward global superpower status.

tile.title: National Vigilance & Counter-Terrorism
tile.desc: Empowering citizens with the skills to identify suspicious activities and follow proper protocols for reporting threats. Learn the art of observation to protect your community and support law enforcement.

tile.title: Cyber Sovereignty & Digital Defense
tile.desc: Master the tools to defend against cyber-attacks and secure critical infrastructure. Focus on building self-dependent technology to ensure digital independence from foreign threats.

tile.title: Information Warfare & Narrative Defense
tile.desc: Expose foreign propaganda, fake news, and coordinated bot networks. Learn to dismantle enemy narratives on social media and uphold the truth through digital awareness and media literacy.

tile.title: Geopolitical Strategy & Intelligence
tile.desc: Understand the global landscape and how to identify external threats. Analyze enemy tactics and regional dynamics to stay one step ahead in the defense of your nation.
